name: Essence of the Body → Exalt fill
description: Cheap baseline rare amulet with a guaranteed Life prefix, then fill the remaining slots with Exalted Orbs.

steps.verb: Use a Lesser Essence of the Body on a normal amulet
steps.outcome: Upgrades the amulet to magic with a guaranteed +Life prefix and one other random mod.
Upgrades to rare and adds one more random mod (now 3 total).
Each Exalt adds one random mod. Stop when you hit a desirable combo or it caps at 6.

notes_for_user: Best entry-level amulet path. The guaranteed Life is the safety net; the Exalt fills are RNG so expect to brick a few before a usable result. Cheaper than chaos-spam since you guarantee one prefix.
